label: Pet moment / Short / 1 child
description: Kid talks to the family cat like a person
transcript: I just overheard Noah um sitting on the floor talking to the cat and he was telling her about his whole day like she was his best friend he was like and then at recess I played with Marcus and we found a cool rock and the cat was just staring at him purring and he goes do you think that's cool and then he paused like he was waiting for an answer

label: Sibling conflict / Medium / 2 children
transcript: So Lila and Noah got in this huge fight over the red crayon like full on meltdown both of them screaming and I was about to step in and um Noah suddenly stops crying and says fine you can have it your pictures are prettier than mine anyway and I was like oh no that's not true buddy but then Lila looked at him and she broke the crayon in half and gave him the bigger piece and said now we both have red and they just went back to coloring like nothing happened and I'm standing there with my mouth open

label: Grandparent moment / Medium / 1 child
transcript: My mom is visiting this week and I walked into the living room and Lila was sitting on her lap and my mom was teaching her how to knit well trying to anyway and Lila's little fingers could not figure it out but she was so focused and um my mom was being so patient and she kept saying you almost got it baby just like that and I watched them for like five minutes before they noticed me and it just hit me that my mom used to sit with me exactly like that when I was little and now she's doing it with my daughter and I don't know it just got me

label: Holiday tradition / Short / 2 children
transcript: Lila and Noah just came down the stairs for Christmas morning and Noah saw the presents and literally screamed and Lila shushed him and said we have to be quiet or Santa might come back and take them and Noah whispered the loudest whisper I've ever heard he goes okay okay okay I'll be quiet

label: Sick day comfort / Medium / 1 child
transcript: Noah's been home with a fever all day and he's just been so pitiful like lying on the couch with his blanket and his stuffed dinosaur and he barely ate anything but um around four o'clock he looked up at me and said mama can you just sit here and I said I'm right here buddy and he said no I mean like right here and he patted the little space between him and the couch cushion so I squeezed in there and he put his head on my arm and fell asleep and I've been stuck here for two hours but I don't even care

label: Learning process / Medium / 1 child
description: Kid struggling but persisting with tying shoes
transcript: Lila has been trying to tie her shoes for like two weeks now and she gets so frustrated she tried again today and messed up like four times and I could see she was about to give up and I almost jumped in to help but something told me to wait and she took a deep breath and tried one more time and she did it it was the most lopsided bow I've ever seen but she did it and she looked at me with this huge smile and said I figured it out all by myself and I was so glad I didn't jump in

label: Imagination / Short / 1 child
description: Solo pretend play, kid in their own world
transcript: Noah doesn't know I'm watching but he has all his action figures set up on the coffee table and he's doing different voices for each one and one of them is apparently a chef who only cooks invisible food and another one is um a dragon who's afraid of heights and he's been at this for like thirty minutes just building this whole world

label: Bath time / Short / 1 child
transcript: Lila made a beard out of bubbles in the bath tonight and looked at me dead serious and said I'm daddy now and I'm going to watch the football and drink my coffee and I have never felt so seen and also so attacked in my life

label: Deep car conversation / Medium / 1 child
description: Kid asks a big question while driving
transcript: We were driving to soccer practice and out of nowhere Noah goes mama where were we before we were born and I was like uh that's a big question buddy and he said like were we just floating around somewhere waiting and I said well some people think different things about that and he thought about it and said I think I picked you and I was like what and he said yeah I think I was up in the sky and I saw you and I said that one I want that one to be my mom and I literally had to pull over because I was crying so hard

label: Art gift / Short / 1 child
transcript: Lila just handed me a folded up piece of paper and said this is for you don't open it until I leave and she ran to her room and I opened it and it's a drawing of me and her holding hands and at the top in her little wobbly letters it says best mom in the world and there are like seventeen suns in the sky

label: Fear conquered / Medium / 1 child
transcript: Okay so Noah has been terrified of the dark like really scared and we've been working on it and tonight um he said he wanted to try sleeping without the nightlight and I said are you sure and he said yeah I think I'm brave enough now and so we turned it off and he grabbed my hand really tight and I could tell he was scared but he just lay there breathing and after a minute he goes it's not so bad actually and I said see you're so brave and he said mama I think the dark is just the light sleeping and I cannot with this kid

label: Breakfast routine / Short / 2 children
transcript: Nothing remarkable just a normal Tuesday morning but Lila poured Noah's cereal for him without being asked and then Noah got up and got her a napkin without being asked and they didn't even acknowledge it they just kept eating and talking about something on TV and it was like watching them be a little team without even knowing it

label: Weather / outdoors / Long / 1 child
description: Playing in the rain, parent reluctantly joins
transcript: It started raining while we were in the backyard and I said okay Noah let's go inside and he said no mama let's dance and I was like we're going to get soaked and he didn't care he just started spinning with his arms out and his face up to the sky and he was laughing and I'm standing under the porch like a responsible adult and then he runs over and grabs my hand and pulls me out into it and you know what I danced I danced in the rain with my four year old and we were both completely drenched and laughing and the neighbors probably thought we were insane but I haven't felt that free in a long time

label: Parent learning from child / Short / 1 child
description: Kid teaches parent something unexpectedly wise
transcript: I was stressed about work and kind of snappy tonight and Lila came up to me and said mama you seem upset and I said I'm just tired honey and she said when I'm upset I take three big breaths and think about something that makes me happy and then she just stood there and breathed with me and you know what it actually worked

label: Bedtime stalling / Short / 1 child
description: Kid's creative excuses to stay up
transcript: Noah's bedtime stalling game is next level tonight first he needed water then he needed to tell me something important and the important thing was that sharks don't have bones then he said his feet were too hot then too cold then he needed to say goodnight to every single stuffed animal by name and there are like twenty of them and the last one he picks up and goes this is Mr Whiskers he's scared of the dark can you stay and I go Noah Mr Whiskers is a stuffed whale and he goes whales have feelings too mama
